mapper.select: select ho.id, ho.user_id, su.username, 'HOTEL' as order_type, h.hotel_name as item_name, ho.total_amount, ho.order_status, ho.check_in_date as use_date, ho.create_time from hotel_order ho left join sys_user su on ho.user_id = su.id left join hotel h on ho.hotel_id = h.id order by ho.create_time desc

select to1.id, to1.user_id, su.username, 'TICKET' as order_type, t.ticket_name as item_name, to1.total_amount, to1.order_status, to1.visit_date as use_date, to1.create_time from ticket_order to1 left join sys_user su on to1.user_id = su.id left join ticket t on to1.ticket_id = t.id order by to1.create_time desc
